We can use the f_sum(area\nsq mi) operation to calculate the total area in square miles for both districts combined.

The total number of square miles in Sandy Bay and Longwood can be calculated by adding the area in square miles for both districts. Sandy Bay has an area of 5.9 sq mi, and Longwood has an area of 12.9 sq mi. By adding these together, the total area is 18.8 sq mi.
